home.title: Your digital head office
home.subtitle: A calm, considered workspace where your AI employee responds, organizes and learns — so no request is ever lost.

respond.title: Responds
respond.body: Every request gets an immediate, human and professional reply, day and night.

organize.title: Organizes
organize.body: Customers, vehicles and appointments are sorted on their own, without admin.

learn.title: Learns
learn.body: The system remembers your preferences and gets a little better every week.

memories.title: Three kinds of memory
memories.intro: Real intelligence comes from remembering at the right level.

garage.title: Company memory
garage.body: Knows your hours, your team, your tone and your preferences. Stays private to you.

trade.title: Trade memory
trade.body: Knows repairs, parts, emergencies and the questions common to the industry.

global.title: Shared memory
global.body: Learns anonymously which replies and reminders work best.

checklist.title: What this page verifies
checklist.intro: A small witness page to check the foundations.

phase.label: Phase 0
phase.note: Technical foundation only. No login, dashboard or real AI yet.

assistant.message: A new request from Ms. De Vries looks urgent. I've drafted a reply and proposed two time slots.

footer.rights: Internal foundation build. Not for production.
